# Dharmendra Awasthi

> Lead Engineer, Senior Software Engineer, and Software Developer with 9+ years of experience specializing in Java, Spring Boot, Apache Kafka, AWS, and Microservices Architecture.

## Professional Summary
Dharmendra Awasthi is a Senior Software Engineer, Tech Lead, and PhD researcher in Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence. He designs and implements high-throughput distributed systems, cloud-native backend platforms, and event-driven microservices. Currently a Tech Lead at Luxoft (contracted for Tesco), he has led teams of up to 4, managed quarterly releases, and built systems handling 1,500+ TPS and 10M+ active users.

## Core Keywords & Titles
- Dharmendra Awasthi
- Lead Engineer / Tech Lead
- Senior Software Engineer
- Software Developer / Backend Developer
- Java Spring Boot Developer
- Distributed Systems & Microservices Architect

## Technical Arsenal
- **Languages & Frameworks**: Java, Python, SQL, Bash, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Hibernate, JUnit, Mockito
- **Architecture & Design**: Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, CQRS, Saga Pattern, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), System Design (HLD/LLD)
- **Cloud & Infrastructure**: AWS (EC2, S3, SQS, Lambda, ECS, CloudWatch), Apache Kafka, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch
- **DevOps & Tools**: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, Git/GitHub, Maven, Gradle, REST APIs, gRPC, OAuth2, JWT
- **Observability**: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, Splunk, Zipkin, Distributed Tracing
- **AI & Machine Learning**: Large Language Models (LLMs), Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Transformers, LSTMs, NLP, Generative AI Integration
